__doc__: Curated overlay for the Changelog tab. Keyed by short commit hash. Each entry supplies the human-judged fields git cannot infer, and may override the git-derived title/description. Run `node scripts/changelog/build-changelog.mjs` to merge this with `git log` into data/changelog.json (the file the app reads). intensity: low | moderate | high. area: free text. audited: whether Trinity has manually reviewed the change. Only commits listed here appear in the changelog.

5523b72.title: Implemented Population & Housing pipeline phases 1-6
5523b72.description: Implemented the full Population & Housing data pipeline with phases 1-6: acquisition, cleaning, aggregation, calculations, validation, and output finalization. Comprehensive test suite included.

b0e8a94.title: Completed Population & Housing frontend implementation
b0e8a94.description: Built the frontend interface for Population & Housing module with line charts and configuration updates.

1c20870.title: Updated script code style
1c20870.description: Applied code style improvements to backend scripts.

d00fc44.title: Completed Components of Change pipeline migration
d00fc44.description: Implemented the full Components of Change pipeline with data acquisition, cleaning, aggregation, calculations, and validation.

e0e5de2.title: Major UI/UX overhaul and graph editor implementation
e0e5de2.description: Completed code validation, redesigned UI/UX, implemented graph editor system, added UI Kit page, and updated project specification.

b20667b.description: Quick CSS styling adjustments and fixes.

5426471.title: UI updates and refinements
5426471.description: Various UI improvements and component refinements across the application.

f4b9030.title: Codebase cleanups and refactoring
f4b9030.description: General codebase cleanup and refactoring across frontend and backend.

f9bc68a.description: Refinements and updates to demographic projections test suite.

34c156a.description: Frontend code cleanup, refractor guide improvements, and partial implementation of demographic projections migration.

7fde4f0.description: Improved H3 heading code rendering and updated refactor documentation guides.

48bb202.description: Updated module audit status tracking in project specification.

4244a39.title: Updated project spec and graph editor planning
4244a39.description: Updated project specification and graph editor implementation planning documentation.

61e9ec7.title: Graph editor phase 5 and test suite
61e9ec7.description: Completed phase 5 of graph editor overhaul and wrote comprehensive test coverage.

a0c3462.title: Graph editor updates and indent fixes
a0c3462.description: Updated graph editor components and fixed indentation issues.

9c53987.title: Graph editor UI refinements
9c53987.description: UI improvements and refinements to the graph editor interface.

158254d.description: Implemented the changelog system with browser, filtering, and presentation components.

2a18091.title: Completed Population & Housing frontend and updated spec
2a18091.description: Finished Population & Housing frontend implementation with update data capability and project specification updates.

46abd7b.title: Validated Components of Change and markdown enhancements
46abd7b.description: Fully validated Components of Change module, updated refactor guide, added footnote field to markdown renderer, and enhanced log card display.

ce00d57.title: Validated demographic projections pipeline
ce00d57.description: Fully validated the demographic projections pipeline and updated project specification and refactor guide.

da38a79.title: Validated ACS Housing Stress pipeline
da38a79.description: Completed validation of ACS Housing Stress pipeline and added backfill script capability.

a1877d6.title: Fixed configuration errors
a1877d6.description: Fixed minor configuration errors and updated notes.

42420f9.description: Completed validation of Building Permits module and updated guides and project specification.

d462190.title: Building Permits module validation completed
d462190.description: Final validation pass on the Building Permits pipeline.

5f35209.title: Updated project notes
5f35209.description: Updated project TODO and planning notes.

8e3551e.title: Wrote RHNA module specification and tests
8e3551e.description: Developed comprehensive module specification and test suite for the RHNA Progress Report data pipeline.

eed011b.title: Implemented RHNA Progress Report module
eed011b.description: Implemented the RHNA Progress Report module backend, updated module specification and project spec, and added dashboard container.

5a1e8fe.title: Added diverging bar chart for RHNA module
5a1e8fe.description: Implemented diverging bar chart visualization for the RHNA Progress Report module.

c80692e.title: Resolved Population & Housing refactor issues; validated the pipeline live
c80692e.description: Implemented every flagged reliability, robustness, and efficiency fix for the Population & Housing pipeline — an immutable historical E-8 baseline with a Phase 0 builder and cold-start guard, hardened E-5 acquisition fallback, real per-row Source provenance, a per-vintage vacancy-rate correction, and a vectorized geographic classifier — then ran it end to end against the live 2020-2026 DoF E-5, fixing DoF's renamed workbook and its new per-county subtotal labels along the way.

f0ba3b5.title: Rewrote refactor guides as as-built docs
f0ba3b5.description: Turned the module 'refractor' planning docs into two-part as-built guides (non-technical overview plus per-function programmer reference with legacy lineage).

174c691.title: Graph editor & viz tool cleanups
174c691.description: Polish pass across the graph editor and standalone visualization tool: layout tweaks, control refinements, and small fixes carried over from the UI overhaul.

9cc6521.title: Added 'view original data' to the module visualization tool
9cc6521.description: New View Data step lets users inspect the underlying source rows behind a module chart before building a visualization.

b778b3d.title: Graph editor UI overhaul
b778b3d.description: Major restructuring of the graph editor interface, including multi-chart support, undo/redo, and the Range/dot-plot chart family.

fcf3d63.title: Updated UI Kit to the official PPIC spec
fcf3d63.description: Brought the living UI Kit in line with the official PPIC color and typography specification.

af33e57.title: Implemented graph editor phases
af33e57.description: Landed the phased graph-editor overhaul (step-wizard flow, encodings, presets) and synced the project spec.

7276856.title: Added pipeline logging + front-end Logs page
7276856.description: Introduced structured run-record logging in the Python pipelines and the /logs page that surfaces successes, recovered fallbacks, and failures.

4e74e13.title: Deleted unused components
4e74e13.description: Removed dead component files and refreshed the project spec accordingly.

041dc6b.title: Added document status fields; updated UI Kit colors
041dc6b.description: Added Status fields to documents, reworked UI Kit color tokens and their rendering.

144b933.title: Fixed the demographic projections pipeline
144b933.description: Tested and repaired the live Projections pipeline (DoF/Census scrapers, fallback re-aggregation, encoding and rename fixes).

a220d2a.title: Completed Building Permits refactor
a220d2a.description: Finished the Building Permits V3 refactor (backend, frontend, and CSV), pending validation.

5b75ba3.title: Added document viewer + markdown rendering
5b75ba3.description: New in-app document viewer with markdown rendering for the docs library.

5fcca1e.title: Completed ACS Housing Stress refactor
5fcca1e.description: Finished the ACS Housing Stress V3 refactor; tested ACS and Components of Change pipelines and fixed pytest.

c9b8796.title: Implemented demographic projections module
c9b8796.description: Initial implementation of the demographic projections module, pending validation.

ce8886c.title: Added report-a-bug button
ce8886c.description: Added a feedback entry point so users can report bugs from within the tool.

bd56b8e.title: Chart builder refactor and Zillow module planning
bd56b8e.description: Refactored chart builder components, visualization rendering logic, and configuration store with comprehensive test coverage. Began planning the Zillow module with factsheet research and implementation guides.

e6a1d7b.title: Decimal-places control and dashboard-style diverging bar
e6a1d7b.description: Added decimal-places appearance setting to format non-integer measure values across Plotly charts (hover tooltips, measure-axis ticks, value labels), and restyled the diverging bar with dashboard-style controls (threshold bucket colors, fixed value range, background track rail, minimal axis chrome) plus a new preset for one-click pace ranking styling.
